scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @agent-dock/shared && npm run build -w @agent-dock/atlassian && npm run build -w @agent-dock/db && npm run build -w @agent-dock/artifacts && npm run build -w @agent-dock/worktrees && npm run build -w @agent-dock/workflows && npm run build -w @agent-dock/agents && npm run build -w @agent-dock/orchestrator
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @agent-dock/api && npm run build -w @agent-dock/web && npm run neutralino:build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @agent-dock/api && npm run typecheck -w @agent-dock/web
scripts.release:mac: npm run package:mac:signed && npm run notarize
